registry_row_zh.获取/处理成本: 低：官方 CSV/FTP，文本和事件字段直接可取
registry_row_zh.理想任务类型: 极端天气事件时间序列、storm impact modeling
registry_row_zh.理由: 官方 event/episode narratives + event time/location/damage/injury fields，文本和事件时序天然对齐，是最适合马上开工的高质量数据。

text_source: Same CSV: EPISODE_NARRATIVE + EVENT_NARRATIVE fields per event/episode
pairing_method: Aggregate events into rolling windows (state/county × event_type × day/week); attach episode/event narratives from history window only as input context; predict future window counts or impact metrics
effort_estimate: 4-8 hours for MVP script; 1-2 days for clean multi-year Alpaca export with geography normalization
probe_notes: FTP reachable (HTTP 200). 2023 sample: 75,594 detail rows. Columns include BEGIN_DATE_TIME, EVENT_TYPE, DAMAGE_*, INJURIES_*, MAGNITUDE, EPISODE_NARRATIVE, EVENT_NARRATIVE. Text is official NOAA narrative.
sheet1_cross_ref: Sheet1 also lists 'NOAA Storm Events + ISD station join' for richer continuous weather TS
caveats: Each CSV row is one event, not a pre-windowed training sample — aggregation script required
Damage fields are categorical strings (e.g. '50K') not always numeric
Narratives may describe ongoing episodes; clip text to pre-prediction dates to avoid leakage
Reporting is heterogeneous by source (NWS, law enforcement, public); sparse in some regions/years
Event counts are report counts, not unique physical events (multiple reports per storm possible)
